name: cursor-billing
description: Auto-download Cursor billing invoices and email them

scripts.schedule: ln -sf "$(pwd)/launchd/com.theodo.cursor-billing.plist" ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.theodo.cursor-billing.plist && echo 'Scheduled: runs on the 3rd of each month at 10:00 AM'
scripts.test:schedule: launchctl start com.theodo.cursor-billing && sleep 30 && echo '--- stdout ---' && cat stdout.log && echo '--- stderr ---' && cat stderr.log
